title: Study Protocol & Materials for "Maybe there's only one passkey?'': Challenges Investigating and Remediating Adversarial Passkeys
author: Daffalla, Alaa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Study Protocol and Materials for:  "Maybe there's only one passkey?": Challenges Investigating and Remediating Adversarial Passkeys  
 We include the study protocol, recruitment, and research materials for our paper. These include the study protocol, participant information sheet, consent forms, codebook, code frequencies, recruitment flyer, screening form, and demographic questionnaire. 
 The account details and passwords included in the participant information sheet are synthetic and were not those used in the study sessions. 
 We do not release the full interview transcripts due to re-identification risks. Researchers interested in accessing the transcripts may contact alaadaffalla@cs.cornell.edu   
  Contents:  
 study-materials 
 
 code-frequency — Frequency counts for each code in the qualitative analysis 
 codebook — Codebook used for qualitative data analysis 
 consent-form — Copy of the consent form provided to participants 
 participant-demographics — Demographic information for all participants 
 participant-sheet — Participant information sheet for an example service with synthetic account credentials 
 study-protocol — Study protocol describing the procedure and interview guide 
 
 recruitment-materials 
 
 recruitment-flyer — Flyer used to recruit participants 
 initial-screening-form — Screening questionnaire used to assess participant eligibility 
 demographic-information-form — Demographic questionnaire administered during recruitment
